author: jamiefdhurst
description: Combine periodic notes with tags and tasks to automatically manage your daily, weekly and project TODO lists. Requires the Periodic Notes and Tasks plugins.

manifest.author: Jamie Hurst
manifest.description: Combine periodic notes with tags and tasks to automatically manage your daily, weekly and project TODO lists. Requires the Periodic Notes and Tasks plugins.
